pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 16th consecutive quiet poll. Dome site stable at V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy. All automated commits (routine data refresh). Canary cold — no OTS fix, no prediction-document separation. Eclipse test ~119 days out.

pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 1 review pending at run start (SEC-2b.3.c1.json). Processed this run. Pending: 0. Queue depth: 0 (popped SEC-2b.3.c1 entry). Mode: BAU.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. 16th consecutive quiet period. All 12 commits automated (monitor.py/pull_data.py). No manual commits.

internal_issues.description: Hardcoded '(9 WINs)' in Section 2b.3 conflicted with {{DOME_PROSPECTIVE_COUNT}}=10 rendering inconsistently in the same paragraph
Hardcoded '87%' stale — dome_claimed_prospective_count is 10, making retrodictions ~85.7%. Replaced with template-variable-driven 'over 85%' prose.
WIN-044 failure described as 'model's own refraction fix' (second mention) vs 'coordinate collapse' (first mention). Harmonized.

TLDR said dome-derived WINs 'use parameters fitted to reproduce already-known values' — inaccurate because WIN-044 is self-contradicted (coordinate collapse), not curve-fitting. TLDR updated to 'fail on examination'.
Exposed arithmetic '{{CA_REVIEWED}} minus {{CA_DOME}}' rendered as '70 minus 2' to readers. Rephrased as 'all but the {{CA_DOME}} dome-derived'.

schema_drift_investigation.note: Integrity agent flagged schema drift (EXP-124/125/145/146/147 with output_file='N/A — <narrative>') in multiple prior reports. Investigated this run: expansion-tracker.json shows 0 items with output_file starting 'N/A'. Schema drift appears already resolved. Dropping from recommended actions — was being echoed without investigation. Will not flag again unless integrity reports new instances.

recommended_actions.action: Human to act on ISS-1014 (moderate, pending-human): Part 2b hardcoded quadruple/triple failure counts will drift as wins.json changes. Requires template variable or dynamic count in generate-html.js.
Review ISS-1015 (minor, open): 3 broken external links (NASA NSSDC, Earth Observatory, HeartMath GCI). Simple URL replacement patches available.
Review ISS-1017 (minor, open): Dome site WIN-057 number collision — same ID used for two different claims. Consider WIN-057b documentation in our coverage notes.
